name: Narrow.One
author: Poki
description: Narrow.One is a 3D multiplayer archery game developed by Pelican Party Studios. Take part in a fast-paced archery action where you and your teammates try to capture the enemy flag in a beautifully designed castle arena. You’re only allowed to use a bow and some arrows, so make sure your aim is on point and your reflexes are fast. Invite your friends to play with you and enjoy the thrill of facing your opponents together. Narrow.One is a ton of fun! How to play: Move - WASD keys Shoot - Hold and release the left mouse button Mobile controls - Use the touch indicator on your screen About the creator: Narrow.One is created by Pelican Party Studios. Play their other legendary games on Poki: Ducklings.io , Nugget Royale and Double Dodgers
